candidate_lesson: When the external regime confirmation drops to internal-only (TV signals=0) AND consensus conviction is below 33% on every pair, the day is a structural NO_TRADE — forcing entries here harvests noise, not edge.
testable_rule: if tv_signal_count == 0 and max(pair.conviction for pair in consensus) < 0.33: return RegimeVeto('NO_TRADE_uncommitted_flow')
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
